description: Style NoteIdeal for hiking, this pair of shoes from skechers double up as lifestyle shoes. While the soft footbed takes the natural curve of your feet, the mesh inner keeps your feet fresh and clean. The lace-up upper of the shoes will keep your foot firm on the ground while the highly technical outsole will accelerate your speed when on the go!Product DetailsBlack shoe with leather upper, dark brown overlays, stitching, perforation accents, central lace-ups and reinforced overlay at the heel collarPadded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upperTPU outsole with an arched midfoot, waffle patterned nubs and terraced grooves along the midfootMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
